temperature.evidence: Customer was polite and engaged in conversation despite declining the offer.

objections.quote: Madam mera term insurance hai already madam.
Nahi-nahi madam close kar denge toh shuruat mein jo charges lagte hain close karenge toh hamara hi nuksan hai na.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer understands his current policy allocation (50% discovery fund, 50% flexi cap).

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer manages his own investments and insurance policies.

agent_promises: one-cr ka term cover ke saath-saath aapko mutual fund ke return benefit
ek hi mein matlab dono ka benefit aapko ek hi plan mein mil raha hai
premium bhi pay karne ki zaroorat nahi hai alag-alag

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer already has a similar ULIP/term product and is unwilling to incur surrender charges.
missed_opportunities: Did not ask about the friend's specific insurance needs beyond the job profile.

approachability.reasoning: Customer was polite and open to referring a friend, though not interested in the product for himself.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent introduced a Tata AIA two-in-one plan, and the customer immediately mentioned he already has term insurance.
call_narrative.customer_response: Customer was polite but firm in declining the product, citing existing investments and potential losses from closing them.
call_narrative.key_event: Customer explained he already has HDFC Life Smart Protect and is unwilling to close it due to early-stage charges.
call_narrative.ending: Customer agreed to consider providing a friend's contact number for the agent to follow up.

key_quotes: Madam mera term insurance hai already madam.
Nahi-nahi madam close kar denge toh shuruat mein jo charges lagte hain close karenge toh hamara hi nuksan hai na.
red_flags: Agent suggested closing an existing policy which would cause financial loss to the customer.
